title: Norilsk
description: A forge modpack based on Frostpunk and real-life Norilsk. Can you survive the eternal winter?
body:
Norilsk is a modpack made for ones that seek challenge. Eternal winter with "Winter Apocalypse++" datapack, forgotten, post-apocalyptic cities with "Lost Cities", and an incredebly hostile environment with "Sculk Horde", "Fungal Infection" and "From Another World". 

Modpack made specifically for multiplayer. Play with your friends and try to cooperate for survival. 

## FEATURES:
-- Temperature system with Cold Sweat and Serene Seasons.

-- Unique world generation: eternal winter, even in Desert and Savanna biomes + Lost Cities. 

-- Ever-evolving, hostile horde of intelligent hivemind -- in fact, three of them! And they battle with each other for the place under this cruel sun. 

-- Full set of Farmer's Delight mods -- food&drinks is just as important as temperature! 

-- Custom healing system with Herbs&Meds. 

-- Immersive weapons, aircrafts and traps to protect your base. 

-- Simple tech and magic mods to make your survival more interesting. 

## IMPORTANT:
-- Use Insanity Shaders, if you can. 

-- Before creating a world, place a simple hut with a Hearth inside and some coal -- or you're not gonna survive till the first night. 

-- Because of copyright issues, we can't include some important mods on Modrinth. Please download the following mods for the modpack to properly work:

[Library Ferret](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/library-ferret-forge/download/4601234)

[Deep Dark Regrowth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-dark-regrowth/download/4941721)

[Better Village](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-village-forge/download/4703624)

[The Starved Stalker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-starved-stalker/download/4898700)

[Void Fog](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/void-fog/download/4590597)

## USAGE:
You can freely use this modpack in your videos or to create custom modpacks based on this one.
